query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Gate report: PASS. Spawning security reviewer.
[tool: Grep(PASS|FAIL) → 5:> Result: PASS (with 1 WARN — pre-existing)
11:| Root cause addressed (not symptom) | PASS | RC-1: shuffle replaces deterministic `sort_by`; RC-2: `embedded_ids` guard at tier entry |
12:| No stubs / TODO / FIXME / placeholders | PASS | No occurrences in changed code |
13:| All tests pass | PASS]
[tool: Glob(product/features/bugfix-421/reports/*.md) → product/features/bugfix-421/reports/gate-bugfix-report.md]
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: Gate 3c: always grep non-negotiable test names before accepting RISK-COVERAGE-REPORT PASS claims
Security reviewer must verify artifact paths exist before cold-read orientation
Batch bugfix swarm procedure: parallel investigators + parallel architects + single rust-dev + single tester
Missing agent-0/agent-1 reports are the most common bugfix gate failure pattern
